title: Set your baseline posture

rejected.title: Your posture wasn't stable enough
rejected.body: Only {{pct}}% of frames over {{secs}}s qualified (65% required).

checkHint.bodyVisible: Keep your upper body clearly in frame — move the camera back a bit or push your chair back.
checkHint.headNotTiltedDown: Don't tilt your head down — look comfortably straight ahead at the monitor.
checkHint.headUpright: Keep your head level, not tilted left or right.
checkHint.noChinRest: Don't rest your chin or face on your hand — keep your hands on the desk.
checkHint.stable: Hold still and minimize movement during the 5-second capture.

error.title: Couldn't build a baseline
error.body: The camera didn't capture enough of your posture. Improve lighting, make sure your upper body is visible, and try again.

holdPosture: Hold a good posture for a moment
holdHint: Hold for just {{secs}}s — we'll set this as your baseline

checks.bodyVisible: Your upper body is fully visible
checks.noChinRest: Keep your hands on the desk
